Record and replay your transactions to any network from the Recorder in the Deploy & Run plugin.
Confused about a function, right-click on it in the editor and choose the 'Explain this function' option to get an explanation from RemixAI.
Generate documentation by right-clicking on a function in the editor and choosing 'Generate documentation' in the pop-up menu.
You can use the help of AI for Solidity errors, click on 'Ask RemixAI'.
To learn new contract patterns and prototype, try the Cookbook plugin!
Activate the Cookbook plugin to read through a wide variety of smart contracts!
To prototype on a Uniswap v4 Hooks, Create a MultiSig Swap Hook workspace.
You can learn Solidity basics and more using the Learneth plugin.
To prototype using the Gnosis Safe MultiSig Wallet: create a MultiSig workspace.
You can verify a contract using the Contract Verification plugin.
You can verify a contract by clicking the 'Deploy and Verify' checkbox in Deploy and Run
Learn ZK tech using the Noir and Circom plugins.
